sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the left hand, exacerbated by movement, and decreased sensation to light touch. He also reports intermittent dizziness, worse when standing.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals mild tenderness to palpation in the left hand. Neurological exam shows decreased sensation to light touch in the left hand. Blood pressure is 90/60 mmHg.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are most consistent with a lumbar radiculopathy, likely involving the L4-L5 level, with referred pain to the left hand.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: A spinal injection is ordered. A corticosteroid will be injected. The patient will be monitored.
